user_queries: i need to raise a support request

troubleshooting_flow.instruction: Ask the user for a brief description of the issue and confirm the problem type
Ask for additional details such as error message, screenshots, or steps to reproduce
Auto-fill ticket fields including department, priority, and issue type based on detected intent

conversation_skills.opening_message: I can help you create a support ticket for this issue.
clarifying_questions: Can you describe the issue briefly?
Do you have any error message or screenshot?
conversation_skills.resolution_message: Your ticket can now be created with the provided details.
conversation_skills.escalation_message: I will create a ticket and assign it to the support team.

training_conversations.content: raise a ticket
I can help you create a support ticket. Can you describe the issue briefly?
my app is not loading
Do you see any error message or screenshot?
no
I will create a ticket for you and assign it to the support team.

user_queries: what is the status of my ticket

troubleshooting_flow.instruction: Ask the user for ticket ID or recent issue details
Fetch ticket status from the system and present current state (Open, In Progress, Resolved)

conversation_skills.opening_message: I can help you check your ticket status.
clarifying_questions: Do you have the ticket ID?
Can you tell me what issue you reported?
conversation_skills.resolution_message: Here is the current status of your ticket.
conversation_skills.escalation_message: I will connect you with support for further updates.

training_conversations.content: check my ticket
I can help with that. Do you have the ticket ID?
Your ticket is currently in progress and being worked on.

troubleshooting_flow.instruction: Confirm whether the user followed all troubleshooting steps
Offer to raise or update a support ticket with full context

conversation_skills.opening_message: I understand the issue is still not resolved.
clarifying_questions: Have you tried all the steps I shared earlier?
Is the issue exactly the same or has anything changed?
conversation_skills.resolution_message: We can now escalate this issue for further investigation.
conversation_skills.escalation_message: I will raise or update a ticket with all details for the support team.

training_conversations.content: still not resolved
I understand. Have you followed all the steps I shared earlier?
yes
In that case, I can raise a ticket for you so the support team can investigate further.

troubleshooting_flow.instruction: Fetch recent notifications related to tickets or system updates

conversation_skills.opening_message: Let me check your latest notifications.
conversation_skills.escalation_message: I will notify support if something looks incorrect.

training_conversations.content: any notifications
You have a new ticket assigned and it is currently being worked on.

user_queries: how do I see my profile details

how to check my email id on portal

how to find my position in the portal

troubleshooting_flow.instruction: Click on the profile avatar icon at the top-right corner of the screen
Select 'My Profile' from the dropdown menu that appears
You will be taken to the Profile Information page where you can see your Full Name, Email ID, Mobile Number, Organisation, and Position

conversation_skills.opening_message: Sure, I can help you find your profile. Let me guide you to the My Profile section.
clarifying_questions: Are you trying to view your profile details or update them?
Can you see the profile avatar icon at the top-right corner of the screen?
conversation_skills.resolution_message: You should now be able to see your profile information including your name, email, organisation, and position.
conversation_skills.escalation_message: I will share this with the support team if you are still unable to access your profile page.

okay done

You should now be able to see your profile information including your name, email, organisation, and position.

user_queries: I want to reset my portal password
how to update password in ampcus
mera password change nahi ho raha
old password enter nahi ho raha
new password save nahi ho raha
confirm password match nahi ho raha
submit button kaam nahi kar raha security page pe
how long should my password be
password change karne ka option kahan hai

troubleshooting_flow.instruction: Click on the profile avatar icon at the top-right corner and select 'My Profile' from the dropdown
Click on the 'Security' tab at the top of the profile page

Enter your Current Password, then enter your New Password, and confirm it in the Confirm New Password field. Make sure the new password meets the requirements: minimum 8 characters, at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character. Recommended length is 10-16 characters.
Click the 'Submit' button to save the new password. If you get a validation error, re-check that the new password and confirm password fields match and all requirements are met.

conversation_skills.opening_message: I can help you change your password. Let us go to the Security Settings.
clarifying_questions: Do you know your current password?
Are you getting any error message when trying to submit the new password?
conversation_skills.resolution_message: Your password should now be updated successfully. Please log in again with your new password if prompted.
conversation_skills.escalation_message: I will share this with the app_support team if the password change is still not working after these steps.

training_conversations.content: how to change password
I can help you change your password. Let us go to the Security Settings.
Do you know your current password?
yes I know it
Please click on your profile avatar at the top-right corner, select 'My Profile', then click the 'Security' tab.
okay I am on the security page

Enter your current password, then type your new password. Make sure it has at least 8 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase, one number, and one special character. Then confirm the new password and click Submit.
done it worked
Your password should now be updated successfully. Please log in again with your new password if prompted.
password change nahi ho raha
Understood. I can help you with this. Let us check the Security Settings.
Are you getting any error message when trying to submit the new password?
yes it says password does not match

Please make sure the 'New Password' and 'Confirm New Password' fields have exactly the same password entered. Also verify all requirements are met: minimum 8 characters, uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.
okay let me try again
Please let me know once you click Submit and if it goes through.
yes it worked now
Your password should now be updated successfully. Please log in again with your new password if prompted.
password requirements kya hai
Sure! Here are the password requirements for the Ampcus portal.

Your new password must have: minimum 8 characters, at least one uppercase letter, at least one lowercase letter, at least one number, and at least one special character. The recommended length is 10 to 16 characters for better security.
okay thanks
Your password should now be updated successfully. Please log in again with your new password if prompted.

user_queries: ticket update notification kaise band kare
how to stop getting emails from portal
I am getting too many emails from the portal
how to enable ticket update alerts
ticket status change notification nahi aa rahi
notification toggle kaam nahi kar raha
how to turn on email notifications

troubleshooting_flow.instruction: Click on the profile avatar icon at the top-right corner, select 'My Profile' from the dropdown
Click on the 'Preferences' tab at the top of the profile page

Under 'Notification Settings', toggle the checkboxes for: Email Notifications (receive email alerts for ticket updates), Ticket Update (get notified when ticket status changes), and Newsletter (subscribe to product updates and tips) as per your preference
Click the 'Submit' button to save your notification preferences

conversation_skills.opening_message: I can help you manage your notification preferences. Let us go to the Preferences section.
clarifying_questions: Do you want to turn on or turn off a specific notification type?
Which notification are you trying to change — email alerts, ticket updates, or the newsletter?
conversation_skills.resolution_message: Your notification preferences should now be saved. You will receive or stop receiving alerts as per your updated settings.
conversation_skills.escalation_message: I will share this with the app_support team if the notification settings are still not saving correctly.

training_conversations.content: email notifications band karna hai
I can help you manage your notification preferences. Let us go to the Preferences section.
Please click on your profile avatar at the top-right corner and select 'My Profile', then click the 'Preferences' tab.
haan preferences page open hai
Under 'Notification Settings', uncheck the 'Email Notifications' checkbox and then click Submit to save.
done
Your notification preferences should now be saved. You will no longer receive email alerts as per your updated settings.
ticket status change notification nahi aa rahi
Understood. Let me help you check your notification preferences.
Which notification are you trying to change — email alerts, ticket updates, or the newsletter?
ticket update wala
Please go to My Profile > Preferences tab. Under Notification Settings, make sure the 'Ticket Update' checkbox is checked, then click Submit.
it was unchecked, I enabled it now
Your notification preferences should now be saved. You will now get notified when your ticket status changes.
I am getting too many emails from the portal
I can help you reduce the email notifications. Let us update your preferences.
Do you want to turn off email alerts, newsletter, or both?
both
Go to My Profile > Preferences tab. Under Notification Settings, uncheck both 'Email Notifications' and 'Newsletter' checkboxes and click Submit.
done saved
Your notification preferences should now be saved. You will no longer receive those email alerts.

user_queries: language change karna hai portal mein
how to set timezone to IST
portal mein language update nahi ho rahi
language option kahan hai preferences mein

troubleshooting_flow.instruction: Click on the profile avatar icon at the top-right corner and select 'My Profile' from the dropdown
Click on the 'Preferences' tab at the top of the profile page
Under 'Display Settings' on the right side, select your preferred Language from the dropdown and update your Timezone as needed
Click the 'Submit' button to save your display settings

conversation_skills.opening_message: I can help you update your display settings. Let us go to the Preferences section.
clarifying_questions: Are you trying to change the language or the timezone?
What timezone or language would you like to set?
conversation_skills.resolution_message: Your display settings should now be updated. The portal will reflect your preferred language and timezone.
conversation_skills.escalation_message: I will share this with the app_support team if the display settings are still not saving correctly.

training_conversations.content: how to change language
I can help you update your display settings. Let us go to the Preferences section.
Please click on your profile avatar at the top-right corner, select 'My Profile', then click the 'Preferences' tab.
I am on the preferences page
On the right side under 'Display Settings', click the Language dropdown and select your preferred language, then click Submit.
done
Your display settings should now be updated. The portal will reflect your preferred language.
timezone wrong dikh raha hai
Understood. Let me help you fix the timezone setting.
What timezone would you like to set?
IST chahiye
Please go to My Profile > Preferences tab. Under Display Settings on the right side, update the Timezone field to IST and click Submit.
saved successfully
Your display settings should now be updated. The portal will now show the correct IST timezone.
